name: Apparatus
description: The Apparatus is a Hyperion repeater pistol. It uses Hyperion recoil compensation: accuracy starts poor, then improves as you keep firing. Barrel selection makes a big difference, ranging from Maliwan-style parts that favour elemental output and steadier aim to Bandit-style parts that hit harder but are less controllable.
notes: In The Pre-Sequel, legacy-style versions typically lose accuracy and fire rate in exchange for higher damage. In Borderlands 2, it is usually found as a standard world drop.
